title: Woodland Blossoming Grove: legacy backlog batch 13 dispositioned
body: Closed claim 8d2c0b7e after processing legacy backlog batch 13 in place. Dispositions: 1 graduated, 2 duplicate, 2 owner-gated. Graduation: PDR-043 and principles now state cue 2 is triggered by structural intent, not only vocabulary. Verification: targeted markdownlint pass, git diff --check pass, practice:fitness:strict-hard SOFT with 20 soft, 22 healthy, 8 ready-empty, hard 0, critical 0. No archive, split, shard, rename, move, or new buffer file.
